## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aftershoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and production progress.](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content tone/style on track; product positioning needs refinement (showcase Aftershoot more)](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Aim for 4 articles next week; ramping up production while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Exploring multiple sources for images/quotes (community, in-house, external networks)](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Internal linking process to be largely automated, with manual checks for key pages](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality and Product Positioning

  - [Tone and style of articles align well with Aftershoot's expectations](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Need to showcase Aftershoot product more in relevant articles (e.g., golden hour photography)](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Suggestion: Use screenshots from the app where appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [For retouching article: Focus on AI vs. manual approach, highlighting Aftershoot's speed (instant) compared to manual tools (e.g., 10-min Photoshop tutorial)](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Image and Quote Sourcing

  - [Current: In-house photographers contributing](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - Plans:
    1.  Build email list through "get featured" page
    2.  Reach out to community for contributions (offer backlinks)
    3.  David to query B2B writers and photographers for quotes/portfolios
  - [Open to using images/quotes from non-Aftershoot users if content quality is good](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Internal linking: Mostly automated with manual checks for important pages](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Aim for 7-10 internal links per article, plus a couple of external links](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)
  - [David to get free Aftershoot account for better product understanding](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### Scaling Up Content Production

  - [Goal: Increase to 4 articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Team feels confident about ramping up, pending Rashid's input](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Monalisa to review next two articles and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue working on current articles, incorporating feedback](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [David to send query for B2B writer/photographer quotes and images](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Aim for 4 articles next week, pending Rashid's approval](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - [Monalisa to build email list for community contributions](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Jakub to assist with setting up survey process for quote gathering](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [David to tag Rashid in Slack for input on production tempo](https://fathom.video/share/-7PyGAmJ_Q8aaP8--w_h5-VN8oNsCoB2?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
